The '''Bomodons''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]],<ref name="TFMCE" /> native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bomodon]] in the [[Churba sector/Legends|Churba sector]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].<ref name="Atlas" /><ref name="Planetnamia" /> In [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], a number of Bomodon [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] were present on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] and were witnessed by the [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] [[Hunting/Legends|hunter]] [[Greedo/Legends|Greedo]] entering [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina]] in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]].<ref name="TFMCE" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Bomodons were created by [[Tom Veitch|Tom]] and [[Martha Veitch]] for the short story "[[A Hunter's Fate: Greedo's Tale]]," published by [[Bantam Spectra]] in [[1995]] as part of the anthology ''[[Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina]]''.<ref name="TFMCE" /> This story was later illustrated as the [[Star Wars comic books|webstrip]] [[A Hunter's Fate: Greedo's Tale (webstrip)|''A Hunter's Fate: Greedo's Tale'']]; however, no unidentified [[Alien/Legends|alien]] species appear in the background of the cantina scenes.<ref name="AHHGTW">{{Hyperspace|url=hyperspace/member/webstrips/greedo/index.html?show=1|text=A Hunter's Fate: Greedo's Tale|int=A Hunter's Fate: Greedo's Tale (webstrip)}}</ref> They received a [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] in ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'', published by [[Del Rey]] in [[2009]].<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>
